description: CASE without ELSE is nullable because unmatched cases produce NULL implicitly

columns.name: active
columns.note: no ELSE clause means implicit NULL for unmatched cases

name: case_without_else
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserActiveOnly
-- @returns :many
SELECT CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 'yes' END AS active FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
